prompt_md: A team wants to take an AI idea all the way from concept to organisation-wide value. Arrange the steps of the pilot → production → scale lifecycle into the correct order, from first to last.

items: Roll out widely with change management (training, trust, feedback) and keep measuring adoption
Define the real value metric and the success threshold before building anything
Run a small, time-boxed pilot with a real user group and measure against the threshold
Decide to scale or kill based on the value metric, real adoption, and sustainable cost
Harden the proven pilot into a monitored production system with owners and support
